name: ATTENTION
fullName: Endovascular Treatment of Acute Basilar-Artery Occlusion
teachingPoint: Established EVT benefit for basilar-artery occlusion within 12 h.

name: BAOCHE
fullName: Thrombectomy 6 to 24 Hours after Stroke Due to Basilar-Artery Occlusion
teachingPoint: Extends EVT benefit for basilar-artery occlusion to 6-24 h.
